description:
A collection of Active Directory Tools to streamline Active Directory

Active Directory Pro Toolkit is an easy to use Active Directory Tools that makes managing Active Directory fast, easy and efficient. Automate tasks that are consuming your time and resources.
New Features
Section titled “New Features”
- Offboard Users - Added “Append to existing description” option so the offboarding note is appended to the current description rather than overwriting it (separator: |)
Improvements
Section titled “Improvements”
- Reset Password - Added “Show passwords” toggle to unmask password fields; preference is remembered across app restarts
- AD Cleanup - “Last Logon” column renamed to “Last Logon Timestamp” to accurately reflect the replicated attribute being used
Bug Fixes
Section titled “Bug Fixes”
- Reports - Fixed filter chips not showing after applying a column filter (FilterBar was never made visible and chips were being cleared before display)
